success_criteria: No linting errors; Pre-commit hooks pass (Husky/pre-commit)
business_impact: Prevents syntax errors and style violations from polluting the repository.

success_criteria: Unit Test Coverage > 80% (C#), > 85% (Python AI), > 80% (Frontend); Build success; No critical SAST findings
tools_used: xUnit, PyTest, Jest, SonarQube, GitHub Actions
escalation_procedure: PR cannot be merged until checks pass; Tech Lead override for emergencies
business_impact: Ensures core logic (especially Financial and AI) meets quality standards before integration.

success_criteria: Zero Critical or High severity infrastructure misconfigurations (CIS Benchmarks)
escalation_procedure: Security Architect approval required to bypass false positives
business_impact: Prevents deployment of insecure cloud resources (e.g., open S3 buckets, permissive SGs).

success_criteria: 100% pass rate on Financial Service Integration tests; 90% pass rate on AI extraction accuracy tests
escalation_procedure: Alert sent to #dev-alerts; Rollback of artifact promotion
business_impact: Verifies microservices interact correctly and external API contracts (Stripe, OpenAI) are honored.

success_criteria: Zero Critical CVEs in container images
escalation_procedure: DevOps Lead review; Patch base image or dependency
business_impact: Prevents deployment of vulnerable runtime environments.

success_criteria: Critical Path Smoke Tests pass (Login, SOW Upload, Invoice View)
escalation_procedure: Automatic rollback to previous version; Incident created
business_impact: Ensures environment stability for manual testing and UAT.

success_criteria: API p95 latency < 250ms; SOW Processing < 60s; LCP < 2.5s
escalation_procedure: Performance regression ticket created; Release blocked if degradation > 10%
business_impact: Guarantees system responsiveness and scalability standards are met before production.

success_criteria: Zero High/Critical vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10) in running application
escalation_procedure: Security Architect sign-off required for exceptions
business_impact: Ensures compliance with SOC 2 and GDPR prior to release.

success_criteria: All previous gates passed; Change Request approved; Rollback plan verified
business_impact: Final go/no-go decision point minimizing production incident risk.
